caption:
Buy 1 Get 1 Saturday Brunch @_muchachas_ 🎉

159 AED with soft beverage
249 AED with house beverage 

We’ve been fans of Muchachas for a long time, so we think this BOGO brunch is the BEST DEAL EVER!

🌮 Set menu includes:
* Starters: nachos, guacamole, Chilaquiles Verdes, chicken wings, tacos
* Main Dish: Fajita
* Dessert: Muchachas Churros
* Beverages: Mocktails, Cocktails, Spirits, and more

🥳 Fun party ambience, cool and casual vibes, fast service 

🗓️ Every Saturday, 1pm – 4pm 

📍 Muchachas Mexican Cantina, Holiday Inn Express, Al Wasl
